Who I Am
ABOUT ME
Your Photo Here
Replace with your professional headshot
(same style as your Canva portfolio)

I'm Markson (Tosin) Ogundepo — a multidisciplinary Project Management Professional combining architectural intelligence with disciplined project controls to deliver complex projects from concept through completion.

With over 8 years of experience spanning architecture, residential and mixed-use construction, PMO governance, supply chain operations, and real estate development, I bring a rare cross-sector perspective to every engagement.

Most recently, I served as PMO & Project Controls Coordinator on the Alstom GO Expansion — one of Canada's most significant transit infrastructure programs — where I drove governance, reporting, and risk tracking across multiple concurrent engineering workstreams.

Beyond the professional, I'm the founder of PULCHER, a global mentorship platform supporting 5,000+ student architects, and a professional photographer and visual storyteller through TMNovaMedia.

Get In Touch →

Career Journey
WORK EXPERIENCE
Featured Role · 2025
PMO & PROJECT CONTROLS COORDINATOR
ALSTOM GO EXPANSION · ACARA SOLUTIONS

Embedded within the PMO of one of Canada's largest transit infrastructure programmes, I drove governance across engineering, construction, and project controls teams. I developed structured reporting workflows, maintained centralized risk and milestone registers, and supported digital transformation through Excel and Power Automate automation — translating complex field data into decision-ready stakeholder summaries.

Business Operations & PM Consultant
TMNovaMedia / Independent Practice · Remote

Apr 2023 – Mar 2025
Warehouse Operations & Project Support
Sobeys Retail Service Centre · Ontario

Coordinated material flow, inventory tracking, and documentation across retail operations. Contributed to ~10% reduction in operational downtime. Maintained compliance and audit-readiness standards throughout.

Supply ChainOperationsCompliance
Aug 2020 – Aug 2022
Project Coordinator
Foreshore Waters · Residential & Mixed-Use Construction

Coordinated concurrent residential and mixed-use construction projects including low-, mid- and high-rise developments. Maintained milestone trackers, risk registers, RFI logs, and site documentation. Achieved ~10% cost reduction and ~20% schedule improvement. Introduced drone-assisted QA/QC documentation.

Sep 2016 – Aug 2020
Design Team Lead & Project Coordinator
Rosebud and Thames Development Limited · Real Estate Development

Led coordination across design, procurement, and construction teams across 23+ project locations including high-profile developments on Banana Island Road, Lagos. Introduced Lumion 3D visualization, achieving ~13.5% material cost savings and accelerating design approvals. Supervised weekly site visits across all active project locations.

Leadership & Entrepreneurship
PULCHER & BEYOND

PULCHER is a global mentorship platform I founded to bridge the gap between architectural education and professional practice. Through design talks, live sessions, and structured mentorship programs, PULCHER has supported over 5,000 student architects across Africa and beyond.

Beyond PULCHER, I co-created Plug-In Dubai — a sustainability-focused travel and design research experience curating cultural and architectural immersion for creative professionals.

As a professional photographer and visual storyteller through TMNovaMedia, I apply my lens to real estate documentation, construction progress reporting, and brand storytelling.
